Description:
Ballistics of the 85×629mmR BR-365P APCR-T shot fired from field gun D-44, tank gun D-5, ZiS-S-53, based on the ballistics of the anti-aircraft gun M1939 (52-K). 

The ammo and the D-44 gun was produced with improvement in the PRC as the WB102P supervelocity armor-piercing tracing round, fired from the Type 56 85mm towed gun. Also employed from the domestic 85mm tank gun on the Type 62 (WZ131) light tank, modified from the ZiS-S-53, chiefly distinguished with the addition of a fume extractor.

Shot		Proj.			Type			Mass	M.V.	P.mcp
								kg	m/s	kgf/cm²
UBR-365P		BR-365P (WB-102P)			"Arrow"	-type APCR		4.99	1050	2580  (288.7 MPa)
pressure specification in copper-crusher gauge, converts to piezoelectric in MPa with factor of 1.12x0.098:

Charge:
Propellant		Geometry		Chrage Mass
Pyroxylin		9/7		2.24 kg
Pyroxylin		12/1-32		0.26 kg

Parameters of the Weapon (D-44):
Gun Length:			4685 mm (incl. breech and muzzle device)
Barrel Length:			4145 mm
Projectile Travel:			3592 mm
Chamber Length:			652 mm (breech to start of rifling)
			553 mm (propellant volume)
Chamber Volume:			4.12 L

References:
- 《火炮内弹道计算手册》王连荣，张佩勤，国防工业出版社，1987
- 《国产火炮手册》兵器工业部第二管理局，1982
- "85-мм дивизионная пушка Д-44: Руководство службы". Министерство обороны СССР, Военное издательство. Москва, 1981.
